# InfiniEdit

> Browser-based save editor for the game Infinite Craft. Single-page, client-side only, vanilla HTML/CSS/JS with no backend, no build step, and no dependencies for the core app. Unofficial fan project, not affiliated with Infinite Craft or its creators.

InfiniEdit opens `.ic` Infinite Craft save files and lets a user edit elements and recipes, analyze the save (duplicates, dead ends, missing dependencies), visualize the recipe dependency tree as an interactive graph, and export the result. All processing happens locally in the browser; no save data is uploaded to any server. Optional live recipe lookups are made against the third-party InfiniBrowser API for autocomplete and auto-fill.

## Docs

- [Full documentation (Markdown, machine-readable)](https://infiniedit.qzz.io/): served when `Accept: text/markdown` is sent to `/`; internally rewritten to `/api/root`. Covers data model, local storage keys, external API calls, full feature list, and keyboard shortcuts.
- [Human README](https://github.com/QikSeekDev/InfiniEdit/blob/main/README.md): marketing-style overview with badges and feature tables.

## App

- [Live app (primary)](https://infiniedit.qzz.io)
- [Live app (mirror)](https://infiniedit.vercel.app)
- [Source code](https://github.com/QikSeekDev/InfiniEdit)

## Optional

- [Issues / feature requests](https://github.com/QikSeekDev/InfiniEdit/issues)
